notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Noelvi Marte steals (1) 2nd base. Noelvi Marte to 3rd. Noelvi Marte advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Agustín Ramírez.

notableEvents.label: Nathaniel Lowe pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nathaniel Lowe grounds out, shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Connor Norby.

notableEvents.label: Nathaniel Lowe pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nathaniel Lowe singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jakob Marsee. Spencer Steer scores. Tyler Stephenson to 2nd.
